_comment: Pool of GitHub credentials the proxy rotates through. Two pool types: 'copilot' (Copilot Enterprise / Pro session-token flow, in-plan) and 'models' (GitHub Models marketplace PAT flow, pay-as-you-go). Most operators want a copilot pool.

pools._comment_type: Copilot pool: each account holds a long-lived OAuth token (`ghu_…` / `gho_…`) obtained via device-flow against the well-known Copilot Plugin OAuth client (Iv1.b507a08c87ecfe98). Per-request the proxy mints a ~25min session token via /copilot_internal/v2/token and forwards to api.enterprise.githubcopilot.com (or api.githubcopilot.com for individual seats). All inference is billed against the user's Copilot subscription — no pay-as-you-go.

Models pool: each account holds a fine-grained PAT with `Models: Read` permission. Routes /v1/chat/completions etc. to models.github.ai. Usage is billed pay-as-you-go via the user's Models budget (set GHE_QUOTA_BURNT_THRESHOLD to control when accounts are taken out of rotation). Leave commented out / empty if you only want Copilot Enterprise.
